title: Minor Koviz Cast
bodyText:
- **Rebekkaah** — "the young female disciple of Brolin/Filbert." F & B true believer.
- **Ricky Fandango** — flamboyant artist; enchanted floating quill; drew the heroes' portrait at the F & B photoshoot (S18).
- **Vendelion** — half-elf magic-shop keeper; buys from Mr. Spells; met an odd gnome traveling salesman.
- **Drumnar** — male dwarf cleric, third contender for the Stonemason seat.
- **Elara Bernardus** — Monk Guild leader (mostly offscreen).
- **Lorian** — drow leader of The Watch (offscreen so far).
- **Voldgreg** — portrait exists (art/voldgreg.jpeg), story doesn't.
